title: Get Pricked!
description: Ever been playing the game and thought a block should damage you even though it doesn't? Well, now they do!
body:
## Bisect Partnership
[![bisect hosting](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/55cc5ca9-2d63-4944-b6ff-d5b216f96ca9.webp)](https://bh.lesbian.skin)

---
[![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/Y8Y5LFJLX)

Ever been playing the game and thought a block should damage you even though it doesn't? Well, now they do!

### Blocks made prickly:
- Stonecutter
- Rose Bush
- Coral Blocks
- Amethyst Buds and Clusters
